## Checklist

- [ ] `make lint` passes (ruff check + format)
- [ ] `make type` passes (mypy --strict)
- [ ] `make test` passes (hermetic suite)
- [ ] Tests added/updated for the change
- [ ] Docs updated if the public API or behavior changed
- [ ] No fixtures contain live tokens, client IDs, or cookies
- [ ] Conventional-commit title (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, ...)
